palette_hint: warm off-white background (#f5f0e8), dark charcoal text (#2b2b2b), rust-red accent (#b84c2e) and muted olive (#7a7a3a) for secondary accents
type_style: system sans-serif (Arial/Helvetica) for headings in bold uppercase, system serif (Georgia) for body text, slightly tight line-height for a printed-matter feel
description: A printmaker and relief artist's portfolio presenting woodcut and linocut work in a plain, press-sheet aesthetic with no imagery.
constraints: single centered column with max-width of 600px throughout all pages
section headings in bold uppercase sans-serif, rust-red color, no decorative elements
thin 1px horizontal rules in olive (#7a7a3a) between every section
navigation is a single line of plain uppercase text links separated by em-dashes, no boxes or underlines except on active page
no images, no cards, no borders on any element — pure typographic layout

page_specs.intro: Artist name 'Mira Voss' as a large bold uppercase heading, followed by the one-line descriptor 'Relief Printmaker — Woodcut & Linocut, Berlin 2014–present'. Below that, three short paragraphs: one on her artistic focus on industrial landscapes, one on her materials philosophy, and a closing line naming her studio, Schwarzschnitt Studio.
page_specs.prints: A vertical list of 10 named print editions, each showing the title in rust-red bold, the year, edition size (e.g. 'Edition of 30'), and a one-sentence description of the subject matter. Titles include works like 'Cooling Tower No. 4', 'Ruhr Basin Dusk', and 'Iron Gate Series II'.
page_specs.process: Three labeled sections — 'Drawing', 'Cutting', and 'Printing' — each with two paragraphs describing Mira's specific methods: pencil-to-paper transfers, Japanese water-based inks, and hand-burnishing on a vintage Albion press. Ends with a sentence on edition signing and documentation.
page_specs.exhibitions: A chronological list of 8 solo and group exhibitions from 2015 to 2024, each entry showing year, exhibition title in italics, venue name, and city. Includes venues like Kunsthalle Dortmund, Printed Matter NY, and Flatbed Press Austin.
page_specs.contact: A brief paragraph inviting collectors and galleries to reach out, followed by Mira's email address in large rust-red type, her studio address in Berlin-Neukölln on two lines, and Instagram handle @schwarzschnitt as plain text.
